title: thelypteris euchlora var. inaequans
intro: Thelypteris euchlora var. inaequans, also known as the inaequans variety of the maidenhair fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Thelypteridaceae. It is a type of fern that has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The inaequans variety of the maidenhair fern has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as teas and infusions, are often used to take advantage of its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects on human health.
